final_prompt.prompt:
Create a luxury product shot of a high-end Swiss tourbillon wristwatch for commercial advertising.

Style/medium: luxury commercial product photography, photorealistic macro still life, Hasselblad H6D-100c aesthetic
Composition: flat lay overhead shot, macro lens perspective, shallow depth of field with focus on tourbillon mechanism, 42mm dial centered in frame
Subject: skeletonized tourbillon wristwatch, 18K rose gold case with diamond-set bezel, visible mechanical movement with balance wheel, hairspring, gear train and tourbillon cage, dark brown crocodile leather strap
Scene/backdrop: dark carbon fiber textured surface, completely defocused background
Lighting/mood: professional jewelry photography lighting setup, multi-angle softboxes creating even specular highlights on metal surfaces without overexposure, accentuating precision mechanical details
Color palette: warm rose gold as primary, deep brown leather and black carbon fiber as anchors, silver steel movement components as contrast
Materials/textures: brushed and polished 18K rose gold surfaces, faceted diamonds, genuine crocodile leather grain, machined steel gears and bridges, carbon fiber weave pattern
Constraints: focus must be razor-sharp on tourbillon cage; metal highlights must be controlled and elegant; color accuracy critical for luxury brand standards
Avoid: plastic-looking materials, blown-out highlights, chromatic aberration, visible dust or fingerprints, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer words
